goal: Deliver and execute exactly one first-attempt T0703 protected M3 Canary from the exact merged main commit. Reuse the already verified moomooau-beta Environment and private-repository binding, process at most one deterministically verified inbound Moomoo-related Gmail message, remotely recover both Raw and Processed age ciphertext, then move only that exact source message to Trash. Do not enter T0704, Timeline, GA, scheduling, final Acceptance or final publication.
scope: T0703 and S7AC-003 protected Oracle only; do not enter T0704 or a later release phase
one controlled pull request and merge of the exact cumulative verified candidate to current main solely to enable T0703; this is not final publication
reuse the already verified moomooau-beta Environment with no manual reviewer and main-only deployment branch policy
reuse the six existing protected Beta Secret values without copying or disclosing them and add exactly two public-safe empty processing registry values
reuse the exact protected Beta config, capacity observation, sender registry, GitHub App installation, private repository binding, age identity, opaque ID key and Gmail OAuth credential
bind repository, owner, actor, main ref, workflow ref, GitHub-hosted runner, run attempt and expected commit before any Secret read
validate the immutable T0702 protected PASS receipt and current same-tree T0703 Run Contract before protected execution
inspect at most one deterministically verified candidate and fetch a full Raw message only after deterministic metadata verification
persist only age-encrypted append-only Raw and versioned Processed objects to the single private data repository
when protected classification or parser evidence is absent, produce explicit encrypted SAFE_DEFERRED Processed data without guessing a rule or parser profile
verify remote recovery of Raw and Processed ciphertext before a second deterministic sender verification
call only users.messages.trash for exactly that verified source message with source-mutation Budget 1
emit aggregate-only public evidence and remove the age identity plaintext from runner tmpfs
run local and CI task, type, package, status, publication, workflow-policy and Stage 7 preflight gates before dispatch
non_goals: GitHub workflow rerun or a second T0703 dispatch
manual GitHub Environment approval, required reviewer or wait timer
creating or renaming a private data repository, creating another GitHub App, broadening App permissions or installing it on another repository
inventing a production classification rule or parser profile without protected evidence
full Raw reads, downloads or mutations for unknown, ambiguous or non-deterministically-verified messages
thread trash, permanent delete, Sent or Draft mutation
Timeline creation or replacement, Blue-Green, T0704, GA, 04:30 schedule, Recovery Drill or Patch Lifecycle
claiming production health, final Acceptance, Stage 7 completion or final publication
performing the final whole-package review or final publication in this run
protected_oracles: the exact T0702 and S7AC-002 protected PASS receipt remains valid and satisfies the M3 predecessor
the existing moomooau-beta Environment remains reviewer-free and main-only with exactly eight allowlisted Secret names
the already linked least-privilege GitHub App resolves the same sole private data repository numeric identity
the reused protected capacity observation is not future-dated or older than twenty-four hours at runtime
the active sender registry deterministically verifies at most one candidate before full Raw fetch
empty protected classification and parser registries can only produce explicit SAFE_DEFERRED Processed output
Raw and Processed ciphertext both recover exactly from the private remote before source mutation
the second verification matches the first and exactly one users.messages.trash call is confirmed
aggregate public evidence contains no Gmail field, Secret or private repository identifier
T0703 and S7AC-003 pass only from the exact first-attempt protected execution receipt
ordering_resolution: The Owner's later explicit full Stage 7 completion authority supersedes the earlier T0702-only stop for T0703 after the real T0702 PASS. This contract consumes only the next DAG node, one controlled main delivery and one first-attempt Budget-1 M3 dispatch; final publication remains withheld.
rollback: Every gate fails closed. Before mutation, retain the Gmail source and every valid remotely recovered ciphertext. If any Raw or Processed recovery, second verification, capacity, identity or repository binding fails, do not call Trash. No GitHub rerun is authorized; a failed protected attempt remains evidence and any repair requires a new exact reviewed commit and Run Contract.
stop_conditions: the frozen Stage 0 manifest, inherited product contract, protected T0702 PASS receipt or cumulative Stage 6 gate drifts
the workflow can run from a non-main ref, non-GitHub-hosted runner, repeated run attempt, unexpected repository, owner, actor, commit, event or Environment
the controlled main delivery, full Raw read, Processed write, M3 run, Gmail mutation or dispatch budget would exceed one
the existing Environment is not moomooau-beta, requires manual review, permits a non-main deployment branch or differs from exactly eight Secret names
the private data repository or GitHub App binding differs from the protected Beta config
a protected credential would be committed, logged, exposed to a public response or retained outside approved runner memory or tmpfs
a Secret outside the exact eight allowlisted names can reach the protected runtime
sender identity, trusted Authentication-Results alignment or business fingerprint is ambiguous, guessed or unavailable
capacity evidence is unavailable, stale, future-dated, RED or UNKNOWN
Raw or Processed remote recovery is not one hundred percent
the source message fails the second deterministic verification or a mutation other than exact users.messages.trash is reachable
Timeline, Blue-Green, T0704, GA, schedule, production workflow or final-publication authority enters the T0703 path
aggregate output can disclose an exact mailbox count, Gmail field, Secret or private repository identifier
